headline: Biogen Canada disappointed by outcome of pan-Canadian Pharmaceutical Alliance negotiations for SKYCLARYS™
summary: Biogen Canada Inc. is disappointed that negotiations with the pan-Canadian Pharmaceutical Alliance (pCPA) for SKYCLARYS™ (omaveloxolone) have concluded without reaching an agreement.

raw.headline: Biogen Canada disappointed by outcome of pan-Canadian Pharmaceutical Alliance negotiations for SKYCLARYS™
